description: A plain screenshot of a Donald J. Trump social-media post (Truth Social / X style), not a designed graphic. The header shows the rounded U.S.-flag-painted profile avatar, the name 'Donald J. Trump' with a verified badge and an additional badge icon, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is black text on a white background reading: 'I am so proud of our ICE Patriots! They were unfairly maligned by the Lunatic Democrats for years, and now, at the Airports, in addition to what they are supposed to be doing, they are helping people with bags, even picking up and cleaning areas. They are so proud to be there! The fact is, they shouldn't have to do this, but they are rehabbing a fake image given to them by Radical Left Democrat politicians. The Public is loving ICE, so the Democrats, unwittingly, did us a favor. They are Great American Patriots, they just happen to have much larger, and harder, muscles than most, which is what they're supposed to have. Thank you to ICE for the GREAT job you are doing. America very much appreciates it! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. This is a reposted text statement.
notable_text: 'I am so proud of our ICE Patriots!... They are Great American Patriots... Thank you to ICE for the GREAT job you are doing.' — President DONALD J. TRUMP
